name: academorix/console
purpose: Console framework — extended AsCommand attribute plus a BaseCommand class wiring OmniTerm output, AOP hooks, duration tracking, and per-command extension discovery.
capabilities: Extended AsCommand attribute with extension-registry support
BaseCommand base class every Artisan command extends
OmniTerm output built in for rich CLI rendering
when_to_use: Every Academorix Artisan command extends the shipped BaseCommand for uniform rendering and lifecycle hooks.
when_not_to_use: For raw terminal rendering primitives without the BaseCommand contract, use academorix/laravel-omniterm directly.
